description: Detail page hosting a related-records table inline. Use when an entity's detail view includes a list of associated items (e.g., a dataset detail with its glossary terms, a user profile with their owned datasets, a catalog item with its lineage records). The detail page provides the primary entity context; the embedded table-list provides drill-down into related entities.

slots.primary: Detail page (header, summary, properties) — uses detail-view skeleton
slots.embedded: Related-records table beneath the properties section — uses table-list skeleton (compact mode preferred)

examples: Dataset detail with glossary term list
Catalog item with its lineage records
guidance: At hifi, the embedded table should default to compact density and limit visible rows (~5-10) with a 'View all' link to a dedicated table-list screen. Avoid duplicating filters from the parent detail page; the embedded table operates within an already-scoped context.
notes: Composition recipe — references the skeletons of detail-view and table-list rather than duplicating them.
Renderer should compose the detail-view skeleton, then inject the table-list body skeleton (without its pageHeader) inside the left column after the properties section.
Use compact table density when embedded; show a 'View all' link if the related set exceeds the embedded row cap.
